profile.name: Muhammad Abdullah Jamal
profile.tagline: I turn data into decisions, and decisions into products.
profile.bio: I clean messy data, ship predictive models, and build the complete web systems around them, admin panels included. By day I run end-to-end cleaning pipelines and Power BI dashboards; alongside that I train ML models for video, vision and prediction, and ship full-stack apps in Next.js and Node with real admin control.

experience.summary: Building dashboards, regex pipelines, and React/Node apps end to end.
highlights: Built regex-based data cleaning pipelines for inspection reports.
Shipped Power BI dashboards used for daily operational decisions.
Developed React/Node internal tools with full admin control.

experience.summary: Responsive UI and mobile UX work on WordPress builds.
highlights: Delivered responsive layouts across client WordPress sites.
Improved mobile UX across key landing pages.

experience.summary: Trained ML models, built Power BI reports, and deployed to production.
highlights: Trained and evaluated ML models for prediction tasks.
Built Power BI reports used by internal stakeholders.
Deployed models and dashboards to production environments.

experience.summary: SQL and Power BI insights for internal reporting.
highlights: Wrote SQL queries to extract and aggregate business data.
Built Power BI visuals for internal reporting.
Worked alongside analysts to define reporting requirements.
